overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a cowboy character exploring a foggy Southern residential district at dawn. The character walks along wet brick paths past a gardener, approaches a grand columned mansion, examines its architecture, then continues down a misty street lined with iron fences.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow garden path between wooden house and landscaped yard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet brick path beside the wooden house

notable_agents.action: gardener bending over tending to plants in the garden bed

entered.detail: two-story wooden clapboard house with weathered siding and shuttered windows
wet brick pathway reflecting the morning light
mature trees and dense shrubs lining the garden edge
ornate black iron fence posts marking the property boundary ahead

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow, misty brick path squeezed between a weathered wooden house on the right and a lush garden on the left. A gardener works in the garden beds to the left, while ahead, iron fence posts and the silhouette of a large mansion emerge from the fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand mansion approach with formal gardens

events.description: exits narrow path into open mansion grounds with clear view of the estate
character stops walking and looks upward at the mansion's columns and balcony

agents.ego_description: approaching the mansion entrance while observing the architecture, then looking up at the columns

entered.detail: large two-story plantation-style mansion with tall white columns and wrap-around balcony
tall classical white pillars supporting the mansion's portico
tropical palm trees flanking the mansion entrance
manicured flowering shrubs and topiary lining the approach

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide, formal approach to a grand columned mansion. The character walks up the brick path between manicured gardens and palm trees, passing through the iron fence line. Upon reaching the entrance, the character stops and looks up at the imposing white columns and balcony against the bright morning sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential street with iron fencing and mature trees

events.description: turns away from mansion and exits onto the street path alongside the property fence

agents.ego_description: walking along the fence line away from the mansion, heading down the misty street

notable_agents.action: woman in a red dress walking in the opposite direction along the path

entered.detail: unpaved dirt and grass path running alongside the iron fence
black ornate street lamp post along the sidewalk
fog-shrouded residential buildings visible down the street

segments.scene_description: Having examined the mansion, the character turns and walks away along a dirt path beside the iron fence. The character passes a woman in a red dress walking the opposite direction. The street stretches ahead into the fog, lined with trees and distant houses, with the mansion now receding to the left behind the fence line.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty residential district that transitions from a narrow alleyway to the grand facade of a mansion before receding back into a foggy street. It begins with the character walking along a narrow brick path squeezed between a weathered wooden house and a lush garden where a gardener works. As the path opens up, the camera follows the character through an iron fence line and across a formal approach lined with palm trees toward a grand columned mansion. The movement pauses as the character looks up at the imposing white columns and balcony against the bright morning sky before turning away to follow a dirt path. The scene finally shifts back into the mist as the character passes a woman in a red dress, leaving the mansion behind while the street stretches forward toward distant houses.
